title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Pro (Rain 8/Oil Painting Patina Amber) SLPR8S08
description:
It's Rare - The Signature Collection is SUBLIME’s peak craftsmanship. Dozens of advanced techniques, CNC carving, multi-axis engraving, and careful hand-finishing, bring each panel to life with rich texture and depth. These finishes are rare on purpose: made with care, and never repeated too often. Bold and full of character, Signature is made for those who want their space to stand out with confidence, culture, and lasting individuality.
Adapter: This SKU default does not include actuators. Need to be ordered together with extra actuators. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：150*172mm； Panel Mounting Projection: 12.5 mm (13.5 mm for textured and deep-carved Pro/Max panels) Mounting Method：The face cover is secured to the flange via snap-fit clips; the flange is fixed to an 80/86/120-type back box,Standard-1个-type back box，Pro-1/2个-type back box，Max-1/2/3个-type back box Wired CoTP: CoTP 3-pin interface * 1、Expansion Module Slot: Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device/Expansion Module Slot/CoTP
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
